subject: A compact, upright fighter in blue and white Saiyan battle armor, arms at sides with fists clenched, surrounded by a bright white-gold energy aura in a wide power-up stance
description: A fighter in blue and white Saiyan battle armor stands in a wide upright power stance, fists clenched at the sides, body radiating a brilliant white-gold energy aura. The hair is upswept and spiky in the classic flame-shape of a powered state. The face is set in fierce determination. The figure is viewed from slightly below, emphasizing imposing presence. The background is washed in golden-white light radiating outward from the fighter. The composition is a mid-shot to close-up.
foreground: Armored fighter in power-up stance with white-gold energy aura, fists clenched
